description: These low top shoes are inspired by converse's lucky charm Chuck Taylor - Basketball player turned salesman. Iconic and synonymous with style and youth culture, these shoes reflect a fusion of sport and style. These converse shoes have an improved comfort insole for better cushioned comfort for your feet. Wear this brightly printed pair with form fitting denims, a monochrome tee and a casual jacket.UpperCanvas upper with diamond print in black, green and purpleCentral lacing system with a long tongue for comfortRubber overlay on the toe box to protect the toe regionReinforced overlay at the heel region for good shoe structureMetal eyelets on the midfoot for ventilationMidsoleContoured Latex foam insole newly developed by Converse to give added cushioning and comfortOutsoleRubber outsole with terraced grooves and patterned lugsShoe careMake a paste using 1 tbsp of baking soda, 1 tbsp white vinegar and 1 tbsp hot waterRub this paste onto the canvas and the sole using a brushWash off with lukewarm water
